TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Rukai, story: RukaiNr-ghost lake_Balenge

S.FORM: kay amatikayane li amani kudra e kavay Talrubalringi Taidrengere.
S.TRANSL: 我說有關小鬼湖(之事)。
My saying is about Talrubalringi Taidrengere.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: kudra matialrulrupi matiasamaimali kavay Talrubalringi.
S.TRANSL: 小鬼湖很有趣又神祕。
Talrubalringi Taidrengere is very interesting and mysterious.

S.FORM: kay Taidrengere sa ka nadruma yaie lu muaane kavay Taidrengere yaie kaidu padalru si kela.
S.TRANSL: 從前去小鬼湖不是很快就到。
(You) can not arrive Taidrengere very fast.

S.FORM: lu katuaseane mua kavay Talrubalringi la e kuini kadalranane la kaika e matuatuay kela malisi kuini kadalranane.
S.TRANSL: 假如去小鬼湖，路程不好也很不容易。
If (you) go to Talrubalringi, the journey is not easy and good.

S.FORM: la e luka taraalupu wakela kuini Talrubalringi kuini taalualupuane.
S.TRANSL: 只有獵人能到小鬼湖打獵。
Only hunters can arrive the Talrubalringi to hunt.

S.FORM: kavay Talrubalringi yaie lu kelaane ka Talrubalringi yaie la ikay kudra taraalualupu.
S.TRANSL: 到了小鬼湖就會有獵人。
When arriving the Talrubalringi, there are hunters.

S.FORM: lu kelaane kuini ki baiyu yaie kaidu kuadraadraw kauriva.
S.TRANSL: 到水面時不能大聲說話。
Reaching the water level, (you) can not be loud.

S.FORM: la kaidu baseasenge ai ania kuini lu iya e lu basengeane si lu e kuaadrawane yaie kudra wakela kuini ememe kela mulebe si.
S.TRANSL: 打噴嚏或大聲講話雲霧會下來。
If (you) sneezing or talk loud, the cloud will go down.

S.FORM: ki kuini baiyu la kirimu.
S.TRANSL: 打噴嚏或大聲講話雲霧會很快來到水面。
If (you) sneezing or talk loud, the cloud will go down to the water level quickly.

S.FORM: e ngivevele turamuru amia matikiukiucu.
S.TRANSL: 水面會波濤洶湧，很可怕。
(the water level) will wave tremendously, and it is very terrible.

S.FORM: kavay e Talrubalringi yaie makalra kudra waudriudripi.
S.TRANSL: 小鬼湖動物很多。
The Talrubalingi, animals are many.

S.FORM: yakay ku akece.
S.TRANSL: 有山羌。
There are muntjacs.

S.FORM: yakay ku babuy.
S.TRANSL: 有山豬。
There are boars.

S.FORM: yakay ku cumay.
S.TRANSL: 有熊。
There are bears.

S.FORM: makalra kuini waudridripi kuini yakay kuini ai sana e adethe su dreele yaie matuase kuini waudridripi makanaelre ubere.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有很多動物，只要你靠近，全部動物就會逃跑。
There are many animals here, but if you approch them, all of the animals escape.

M.TRANSL: 第二人稱單數.附著主格

S.FORM: laiyakay lu kelaane kavay Talrubalringi yaie kaidu wakaurivariva kuadraw kaidu wabaseasenge laiya.
S.TRANSL: 所以說當來小鬼湖時，你不能大聲說話或打噴嚏。
So it is said that when (you) arrive the Talrubalingi, (you) can not talk loud and sneeze.

S.FORM: miakauamani kudra e yakay ku lakuka yakay ku la e haimai walrededepe ikay kuini ki baiyu baiyu amia.
S.TRANSL: 就好像水中有鵝和鴨在游著。
(It is) like there are goose and duck swimming in the water level.

S.FORM: kavay e Talrubalringi kuini e mathariri kuini cekele.
S.TRANSL: 這個很漂亮的的故鄉，小鬼湖。
This beautiul hometown, Talrubalringi.

S.FORM: lu ikay ku zikange madu la mua madu dreele kuini mathariri kuini cekele kuini e Talrubalringi.
S.TRANSL: 有空的話要來看這個漂亮的故鄉，小鬼湖。
If (you) have time, please come to see this beautiful hometown, Talrubalringi.

S.FORM: kasane kay aiyaane li.
S.TRANSL: 我就說到這裡。
This is all I said.

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱單數.附著屬格

S.FORM: sabaw.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝。
Thanks.
